user_story: Wake up the Molinar bot and observe the 3D world: pull the full snapshot, then look around to confirm the read endpoints work. Read-only — no movement, jumping, or chat that would affect other players in the live world.

turns.prompt: You're spawning into the Molinar world for the first time. Pull the current world snapshot and tell me where you are: position, biome, and whether anyone else is online.
Now take a fresh look around (use look or get_state again) and report what you see — any nearby coins, trees, buildings, or chat messages?
